implemented_contracts: Production saved-view identity mode defaults to trusted_gateway when EEI_ENV is prod or production
Local development mode retains local_user default identity unless EEI_SAVED_VIEW_IDENTITY_MODE overrides it
trusted_gateway mode requires EEI_SAVED_VIEW_GATEWAY_SECRET and returns 503 when the gateway secret is not configured
trusted_gateway mode requires X-EEI-User-Namespace, X-EEI-Actor, X-EEI-Auth-Timestamp and X-EEI-Auth-Signature
X-EEI-Auth-Signature is an HMAC-SHA256 hex signature over signature version, HTTP method, request path, namespace, actor and timestamp
Invalid, missing or expired gateway signatures fail closed with 401
OpenAPI and CORS expose the saved-view identity and signature headers without exposing or storing gateway secrets

runtime_parameters.EEI_SAVED_VIEW_GATEWAY_SECRET: required when identity mode is trusted_gateway; never committed

checks: production environment defaults to trusted_gateway identity mode
explicit local identity mode override remains available for local development
missing gateway secret fails closed with 503
unsigned gateway headers fail closed with 401
valid signatures resolve the expected saved-view principal
CORS and OpenAPI include gateway identity headers
